items.author: Monte Poole
items.body_excerpt:
Warriors SAY they're not moving Jimmy Butler III. They are, however, still HOPING for the LeBron Hail Mary.
LeBron-Steph? Check. LeBron-Draymond? Check. 
LeBron-Jimmy? An utter misfit. Putting either off the ball is entirely detrimental.
